content.problemStatement:
Nightking wants to attack the kingdom and he really likes cold days. However, he
doesn’t want to attack the kingdom on the coldest day, because it is obvious.

Instead, he will attack the second coldest day.
Given an array AAA of NNN **distinct** integers where AiA_iAi​ represents the temperature forecast of the iii-th day, You need to find the temperature of the day of the attack.


Input Format

First-line will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains two lines of input.
The first line of every test case contains an integer NNN - the number of days
The second line of every test case contains NNN integers - A1,A2,..,AN A_1,A_2,..,A_NA1​,A2​,..,AN​ denoting the temperature forecast of the iii-th day.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line - the answer to the iii-th test case.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: There are only 222 days, so the night king will attack the day with a higher temperature.
Test Case 333: Out of the 555 possible days, Night King will attack the day with the 2nd lowest temperature, therefore 212121 will be the answer.
